tools.name: transcribe_audio
tools.description: Transcribe a local audio or video file to text, SRT, and VTT using vocce's hosted Whisper large-v3. No API key required. Returns { text, srt, vtt, language }.

file_path.description: Absolute path to a local audio/video file (mp3, wav, m4a, mp4, mov, …), up to 50 MB.

language.description: ISO code like 'en', 'zh', 'ja'. Omit to auto-detect.
